# CircleCI CLI

Promote a dev orb version to a stable semver version.

The dev version ref must be in the form <ns>/<orb>@dev:<label>.
The segment argument determines how the version is incremented
from the latest stable release.

## Usage

`circleci orb publish promote <ns>/<orb>@dev:<label> major|minor|patch`

## Inherited Flags

| Flag                  | Description                                                  |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `-c, --config string` | path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml) |
| `--debug`             | enable debug logging                                         |
| `-q, --quiet`         | suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected  |

## Examples

- Promote dev:my-branch to a patch release: 
  `circleci orb publish promote myorg/my-orb@dev:my-branch patch`
- Promote to a minor release: 
  `circleci orb publish promote myorg/my-orb@dev:my-branch minor`
- Promote to a major release: 
  `circleci orb publish promote myorg/my-orb@dev:my-branch major`

## Learn More

- Use `circleci <command> <subcommand> --help` for more information about a command.
- Read the manual at <https://circleci.com/docs/local-cli>
- Support at <https://github.com/CircleCI-Public/circleci-cli/issues>
